reference: About three weeks ago, I experienced sudden pain in my mid back area, perhaps in the kidney area. I could not get comfortable sitting or lying down. It went away in a few days, but it came back a week later with the same symptoms. It has now lasted ten days. I have not had kidney stones before. I do not have fever, fatigue, or nausea; I feel fine otherwise.
text: About three weeks ago, I experienced some pain in my lower back area. Perhaps it misfitted. I could not get comfortable sitting or lying down. It went away in a few days, but it came back a week later with the same symptoms. It has now lasted ten days. I have not had fever. The fever, Flavia. I feel fine otherwise.
